_readme: Copy this file, rename it to your-project-slug.json, fill in the fields, and delete all '_comment' keys. The file will auto-render on the projects page.
_comment_id: Unique kebab-case slug. Must match the filename (minus .json).
title: Your Project Title
_comment_company: Must match the 'id' field of an experience JSON in src/data/experiences/. Options: touchnet | quotient | zycus | justdial
_comment_period: Year (or range like '2023-2024'). Used for sorting within a company.
_comment_featured: Set true to pin this project to the top of the list (shows a ★ on the card).
_comment_categories:
Free-form tags. These auto-populate the Category filter bar. Reuse existing ones where possible for clean filtering.
  Existing categories: AI/ML, AWS, Automation, Azure, Backend, CI/CD, Cloud, Containers, Data, DevOps, GCP, Infrastructure, Kubernetes, Linux, Microservices, Migration, Observability, Scripting, Security, SRE, Terraform
summary: One sentence shown on the card — what you built and why it mattered.
_comment_metrics: 2-3 punchy numbers shown on the card and enlarged in the detail panel. Keep labels short (≤ 15 chars).
_comment_techBadges: Technologies shown as pills. First 3 appear on the card; the rest appear only in the detail panel.

content.value: Plain paragraph. Describe the problem / context here.
content._comment: Use multiple text blocks rather than one giant paragraph.

content.title: Key Decision
content.value: Explain a key architectural or technical decision and why you made it.

content.label: main.tf
content._comment_lang: Any string: terraform | python | yaml | bash | go | javascript | json | hcl
content._comment_label: Filename shown in the code block header bar.
content._comment_value: The raw code string. Use \n for newlines and \" for quotes inside the JSON string.

content.title: Gotcha
content.value: A pitfall or non-obvious issue others should know about.

content.title: Outcome
content.value: Quantified results — tie back to the metrics above.

content.title: References
content._comment: All items optional — include only the links that exist.
